title: The Open Gates

sections.label: Intro
lines: (Spoken) “This is the day the Lord has made…”

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Out of the depths, I called, and You answered,
Your mercy stretched like rivers wide.
The stone rejected stands unshaken,
The cornerstone of time and tide.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Oh, the gates of justice swing,
I enter in, I enter in.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Your steadfast love endures forever,
Through shadowed nights and burning days.
I will not fear; You are my refuge,
The song of triumph, my soul's embrace.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Nations surrounded, yet I was not broken,
Your strength became my guiding hand.
In the open field of endless mercy,
I found a place where I could stand.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Oh, the gates of justice swing,
I enter in, I enter in.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Your steadfast love endures forever,
Through shadowed nights and burning days.
I will not fear; You are my refuge,
The song of triumph, my soul's embrace.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Pressed on every side, but not forsaken,
Flames surround, yet I do not burn.
The Lord’s right hand has done great wonders,
The tides of fear begin to turn.

sections.label: Post-Chorus
lines: This is the gate of the Lord,
The righteous will walk through.
I will give thanks, I will give thanks,
Forever fixed on You.

sections.label: Outro
lines: Your love endures…
Forever…

epigraph: Open to me the gates of righteousness
